name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changing code chip
M45976 Embossed Black Large M46041 Large Grey Screen Print
M45979 Black Screen Print
Louis Vuitton's new Madeleine Medium Bag features Monogram Empreinte embossed leather with top handles, suitable for both business and casual occasions. Leather key pouch and S-lock closure reflect the brand's travel heritage, featuring a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap.
Dimensions: 30.0 x 19.5 x 11.0 cm (Length x Height x Width)
